programme.title: Attack
programme.desc: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and traumatised with thoughts of his dead lover. When the attacker returns, Arjun puts his life on the line to serve his nation and seek revenge.

programme.title: Mission Majnu
programme.desc: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

programme.title: Bawaal
programme.desc: A small-town man falls in love with the prettiest girl in town. However, he ends up marrying her in order to raise his social standing.

programme.title: Lootera
programme.desc: In 1953, Pakhi, an aristocrat's daughter, falls in love with an archaeologist. However, unbeknownst to her, he leads a double life that threatens their relationship.

programme.title: Berlin
programme.desc: In 1993 New Delhi, a deaf-mute suspected spy is arrested before the Russian president's visit. A sign language interpreter unravels a mystery that blurs guilt and innocence.

programme.title: Janhit Mein Jaari
programme.desc: With the will to break taboo as her armour of choice, Mannu embarks to work as a condom salesperson, despite the reservations of her family and society.

programme.title: Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
programme.desc: As Krishna, an incarcerated man, faces early release, his love story with Vasudha from more than twenty years ago unfurls.

programme.title: Shivaay
programme.desc: Shivaay, an Indian mountaineer, goes to Bulgaria with his daughter Gaura to meet his wife. However, chaos ensues when a child trafficking gang kidnaps Gaura, and Shivaay must do his best to save her.

programme.title: Munjya
programme.desc: When Bittu visits his village, he uncovers a dark family secret involving a vengeful spirit, Munjya, who is desperate to marry. Bittu must navigate through chaos to protect himself and his lover.

programme.title: Chandu Champion
programme.desc: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination. His spirit and resilience propel him through adversity, ultimately forging a path to historic achievement.
